title: Fix man page to mention race condition
body:
Also modify man page to talk about podman-container-logs as well as podman-logs.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

push and search tests are failing which I can't imagine is due to this PR.

```[Fail] Podman push [It] podman push to local registry with authorization```

***Yes*** I know about that, it's breaking everywhere, no idea why.  :frowning:
